ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Measurement of the bust in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Measurement of the length in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Measurement of the shoulder width in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement of the waist in inches */,
  "country_standard" TEXT /* Standard used (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "hip" REAL /* Measurement of the hip in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Measurement of the sleeve length in inches */,
  "neck" REAL /* Measurement of the neck in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Measurement of the inseam in inches (for pants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size specifications */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Full shipping address */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state */,
  "shipping_zip_code" TEXT /* Shipping zip code */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Shipping country */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order containing this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "fit" TEXT /* Customer's feedback on the fit */,
  "comfort" TEXT /* Customer's feedback on the comfort */,
  "recommend" INTEGER /* Whether the customer would recommend the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory_manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of change (positive or negative) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
